short_description: The Epson SureColor SC-T7700DM is a professional 44-inch multifunction wide-format printer combining high-speed printing, scanning, and copying. It offers dual-roll capacity and advanced color management for design and construction firms.

name: Epson SC-P9000 Large Format Printer Spectro
short_description: The Epson SC-P9000 Large Format Printer with built-in SpectroProofer delivers exceptional color accuracy and gamut for proofing, fine art, and photography. It features Epson UltraChrome HDX ink with 10 colors for gallery-quality output.

name: Epson SC-P9000V Printer Violet Spectro
short_description: The Epson SC-P9000V with Violet ink and SpectroProofer expands the color gamut even further, enabling accurate Pantone emulation for commercial packaging and proofing applications with unmatched color fidelity.

name: Epson SureColor SC-F100 Sublimation Printer
short_description: The Epson SureColor SC-F100 is a compact A4 dye-sublimation printer for creating vibrant, long-lasting transfers on mugs, T-shirts, and other merchandise. It's the ideal entry point for gift shops and small customization businesses.

name: Epson SureColor SC-P7500 24" Printer Spectro
short_description: The Epson SureColor SC-P7500 is a 24-inch professional photo/graphic printer with built-in spectrophotometer. It utilizes 12-color UltraChrome Pro12 ink for the widest color gamut in its class, perfect for photography, proofing, and fine art.

name: Epson SureColor SC-P9500 Large Format Printer Spectro
short_description: The Epson SureColor SC-P9500 is a flagship 44-inch professional printer with 12-color UltraChrome Pro12 ink and built-in spectrophotometer. It delivers unmatched color accuracy and gamut for proofing studios, galleries, and fine art reproductions.

name: Epson SureColor SC-T7200 44" MFP Large Format Printer
short_description: The Epson SureColor SC-T7200 is a 44-inch large format multifunction printer ideal for print service providers and design studios. It offers fast output, precise color, and built-in scanning capabilities for a complete large-format workflow.

name: Citizen CX02 Digital Photo Printer
short_description: The Citizen CX02 is a compact, high-speed dye-sublimation photo printer delivering stunning lab-quality prints from 4x6 to 8x12 inches. Perfect for photo studios, events, and retail photo printing with fast output and easy operation.

name: Citizen CX-02W 8" Large Photo Printer
short_description: The Citizen CX-02W is an 8-inch wide dye-sublimation photo printer for professional-grade photo printing. It supports panoramic and extra-large print sizes, ideal for studios, photo booths, and event photography businesses.

name: Citizen CY02 Photo Printer
short_description: The Citizen CY02 is a next-generation compact dye-sublimation photo printer with ultra-low running costs and fast output. Ideal for event photography, photo booths, and retail photo kiosks, it delivers vivid, long-lasting prints.

name: Citizen CZ01 Photo Printer
short_description: The Citizen CZ01 is a premium dye-sublimation photo printer with advanced print quality and versatile media handling. It caters to professional photographers and studios demanding the highest quality dye-sub output.

name: Epson SureColor SC-P900 Printer With Roll Adapter
short_description: The Epson SureColor SC-P900 with Roll Adapter is a 17-inch professional photo printer delivering gallery-quality output with 10-color UltraChrome Pro10 ink. The roll adapter enables panoramic and borderless printing on roll media.

name: Epson SureColor P900 Photo Printer
short_description: The Epson SureColor P900 is a professional 17-inch desktop photo printer engineered for photographers and artists who demand museum-quality output. With 10-color UltraChrome Pro10 ink, it achieves an exceptionally wide color gamut.

name: Epson SureColor SC-P700 13" Photo Printer
short_description: The Epson SureColor SC-P700 is a compact 13-inch professional photo printer with 10-color UltraChrome Pro10 ink. It's the perfect desktop solution for photographers who want gallery-quality prints without a large-format device.

name: Epson WorkForce DS-70 Business Scanner
short_description: The Epson WorkForce DS-70 is an ultra-portable business scanner that fits in your bag. It quickly scans documents, receipts, and business cards on the go, making it ideal for mobile professionals and remote workers.

name: Epson WorkForce DS-80W Wireless Portable Scanner
short_description: The Epson WorkForce DS-80W is a wireless portable scanner with battery power for true mobile scanning freedom. Scan directly to smartphones and cloud services via Wi-Fi, making paperwork management effortless anywhere.

name: Epson WorkForce DS-1630 Flatbed Color Document Scanner
short_description: The Epson WorkForce DS-1630 is a versatile flatbed scanner with ADF for high-volume document scanning. It handles everything from thick books to fragile documents with its flatbed glass, plus fast batch scanning via the 50-page ADF.

name: Epson WorkForce DS-1660W Wi-Fi Flatbed Color Scanner
short_description: The Epson WorkForce DS-1660W adds wireless connectivity to a versatile flatbed scanner with ADF. Share the scanner across your office network and scan directly to cloud, email, or network folders wirelessly.

name: Epson WorkForce DS-310 Portable Sheet-fed Document Scanner
short_description: The Epson WorkForce DS-310 is a portable sheet-fed scanner designed for professionals who need fast, reliable document scanning on the go. Its compact form factor and USB-powered design make it the perfect travel companion.

name: Epson WorkForce DS-360W Wi-Fi Portable Scanner
short_description: The Epson WorkForce DS-360W combines portable sheet-fed scanning with wireless connectivity and battery power. Scan documents wirelessly to smartphones, tablets, and cloud services from anywhere â€” perfect for field professionals.

name: Epson WorkForce DS-530II Color Duplex Document Scanner
short_description: The Epson WorkForce DS-530II is a high-speed desktop document scanner designed for busy offices. With its robust 50-page ADF and fast duplex scanning, it efficiently handles high-volume document digitization workflows.

name: Canon EOS R5 Mark II Mirrorless Camera
short_description: The Canon EOS R5 Mark II is the ultimate full-frame mirrorless camera with a 45MP stacked CMOS sensor, intelligent Dual Pixel CMOS AF II, and the ability to shoot 8K RAW video internally. Designed for professional photographers and filmmakers who demand the very best.

name: Canon EOS R6 Mark III Mirrorless Camera
short_description: The Canon EOS R6 Mark III delivers 32.5MP full-frame performance with blazing-fast autofocus and advanced video capabilities. An ideal all-rounder for wedding, sports, and wildlife photographers seeking speed and versatility.
features: Advanced Dual Pixel CMOS AF II

name: Canon EOS R7 APS-C Mirrorless Camera
short_description: The Canon EOS R7 is a high-speed APS-C mirrorless camera that delivers professional-grade performance for wildlife, sports, and action photography. With its 32.5MP sensor and blazing 30fps shooting, it captures every decisive moment.

name: Canon EOS R8 Full-frame Mirrorless Camera
short_description: The Canon EOS R8 packs full-frame performance into an incredibly compact and lightweight body. With 24.2MP resolution, excellent low-light capability, and advanced autofocus, it's perfect for travel and everyday photography.

name: Canon EOS R10 APS-C Mirrorless Camera
short_description: The Canon EOS R10 is a versatile APS-C mirrorless camera perfect for travel, vlogging, and everyday photography. It combines fast 23fps shooting with intelligent autofocus and 4K video in a compact, lightweight body.

name: Canon EOS R50 Mirrorless Camera
short_description: The Canon EOS R50 is a compact and stylish entry-level mirrorless camera designed for content creators and photography enthusiasts. With smart autofocus, 4K video, and a vari-angle touchscreen, creating stunning content is effortless.

name: Canon EOS R100 Entry-level Mirrorless Camera
short_description: The Canon EOS R100 is the most accessible RF-mount mirrorless camera, making it easy for beginners to capture beautiful photos and videos. Its intuitive controls and guided UI help newcomers learn photography effortlessly.

name: Canon EOS R1 Professional Mirrorless Camera
short_description: The Canon EOS R1 is the flagship professional mirrorless camera, built for unparalleled speed, reliability, and precision. With cross-type Dual Pixel AF, AI-powered subject tracking, and the most robust build quality, it's the ultimate tool for sports, news, and wildlife professionals.

name: Canon EOS R3 Professional Mirrorless Camera
short_description: The Canon EOS R3 is a high-performance professional mirrorless camera designed for sports, news, and wildlife photographers who demand speed and precision. With Eye Control AF and 30fps shooting, it sets a new standard for professional imaging.

specs.autofocus: Dual Pixel CMOS AF II + Eye Control

name: Canon PowerShot V10 Vlog Camera
short_description: The Canon PowerShot V10 is a pocket-sized vlogging camera with a built-in stand, wide-angle lens, and high-quality stereo microphone. Perfect for content creators who want professional-quality video from a device that fits in their pocket.

name: Canon PowerShot G7 X Mark III Premium Compact
short_description: The Canon PowerShot G7 X Mark III is an advanced premium compact camera popular with vloggers and content creators. With a large 1-inch sensor, fast f/1.8 lens, and YouTube live-streaming capability, it's the ultimate pocket powerhouse.

name: Canon RF 24-70mm f/2.8L IS USM Lens
short_description: The Canon RF 24-70mm f/2.8L IS USM is the essential professional standard zoom lens for the EOS R system. With a fast f/2.8 constant aperture, 5-stop image stabilization, and exceptional L-series optics, it excels in every shooting situation.

name: Canon RF 70-200mm f/2.8L IS USM Lens
short_description: The Canon RF 70-200mm f/2.8L IS USM redefines the telephoto zoom with a revolutionary compact design. This lightweight L-series lens delivers stunning portrait and sports imagery with smooth bokeh and lightning-fast autofocus.

name: Canon RF 50mm f/1.8 STM Lens
short_description: The Canon RF 50mm f/1.8 STM is a compact, affordable prime lens that delivers beautiful portraits with creamy background blur. Its lightweight design and fast f/1.8 aperture make it the perfect walk-around lens for EOS R cameras.

name: Canon RF 100-500mm f/4.5-7.1L IS USM Lens
short_description: The Canon RF 100-500mm f/4.5-7.1L IS USM is the ultimate super-telephoto zoom for wildlife and sports photography. With incredible 5x zoom range and 6-stop stabilization, it brings distant subjects dramatically close with professional L-series sharpness.

name: Canon RF 85mm f/1.2L USM Portrait Lens
short_description: The Canon RF 85mm f/1.2L USM is the ultimate portrait lens, delivering an astonishingly shallow depth of field with silky smooth bokeh. L-series optics ensure tack-sharp subject detail while backgrounds melt into dreamy softness.

name: Canon RF-S 18-45mm f/4.5-6.3 IS STM Lens
short_description: The Canon RF-S 18-45mm f/4.5-6.3 IS STM is an ultra-compact and lightweight standard zoom lens designed for APS-C EOS R cameras. Its slim profile makes it the perfect everyday walk-around lens for travel and casual photography.

name: Canon RF 15-35mm f/2.8L IS USM Wide-Angle Lens
short_description: The Canon RF 15-35mm f/2.8L IS USM is a professional ultra-wide-angle zoom with constant f/2.8 aperture and built-in image stabilization. Perfect for landscape, architecture, and real estate photography with edge-to-edge sharpness.

name: Canon Speedlite EL-1 Professional Flash
short_description: The Canon Speedlite EL-1 is the flagship professional flash with active cooling, silent operation, and an innovative lithium-ion battery. It delivers consistent, reliable flash performance for wedding, event, and studio photographers.

name: Canon EF-EOS R Control Ring Mount Adapter
short_description: The Canon EF-EOS R Control Ring Mount Adapter allows you to use your existing EF and EF-S lenses on any Canon EOS R mirrorless camera. The customizable control ring adds a new level of shooting control to your adapted lenses.

specs.compatibility: EF / EF-S lenses to RF mount

name: Canon Backpack BP10 Camera Bag
short_description: The Canon Backpack BP10 is a professionally designed camera backpack that carries your Canon EOS camera, multiple lenses, and accessories in organized, padded compartments. Built for comfort during long shoots and travel.

name: Epson EB-992F Full HD Wireless Projector
short_description: The Epson EB-992F is a versatile Full HD wireless projector designed for meeting rooms and classrooms. With 4000 lumens brightness, 3LCD technology, and built-in wireless mirroring, it delivers vivid, color-accurate presentations in any lighting condition.

name: Epson EB-2265U WUXGA 3LCD Projector
short_description: The Epson EB-2265U is a high-brightness WUXGA projector ideal for large conference rooms and auditoriums. With 5500 lumens, advanced wireless networking, and lens shift capabilities, it delivers stunning presentations even in bright environments.

name: Epson EH-TW6250 4K PRO-UHD Home Cinema Projector
short_description: The Epson EH-TW6250 brings the cinema experience home with 4K PRO-UHD resolution, 2800 lumens, and Android TV built in. Stream your favorite content in stunning clarity with vibrant, lifelike colors powered by 3LCD technology.

name: Epson EB-L260F Full HD Laser Projector
short_description: The Epson EB-L260F is a maintenance-free Full HD laser projector offering 4600 lumens brightness and a 20,000-hour laser light source. Perfect for corporate meeting rooms requiring reliable, always-on projection without lamp replacements.

name: Epson EB-FH52 Full HD Portable Projector
short_description: The Epson EB-FH52 is a bright, portable Full HD projector perfect for on-the-go presentations. With 4000 lumens and wireless connectivity, it delivers stunning visuals in any meeting room, classroom, or portable setup environment.

name: Canon imageFORMULA DR-C225W II Wireless Scanner
short_description: The Canon imageFORMULA DR-C225W II is a compact desktop document scanner with wireless connectivity and an innovative space-saving U-turn path design. Ideal for small offices and remote workers who need efficient, flexible document digitization.

name: Canon imageFORMULA DR-M260 Document Scanner
short_description: The Canon imageFORMULA DR-M260 is a high-performance desktop document scanner built for demanding office workflows. With 60 ppm scanning speed, 80-sheet ADF, and an onboard image processing CPU, it handles high-volume digitization with ease.

name: Canon CanoScan LiDE 400 Flatbed Scanner
short_description: The Canon CanoScan LiDE 400 is a slim, stylish flatbed scanner with ultra-high 4800 dpi resolution. Powered by a single USB-C cable, it's perfect for scanning photos, documents, and delicate materials at home or in the office.

name: Canon imageFORMULA DR-F120 Flatbed Document Scanner
short_description: The Canon imageFORMULA DR-F120 combines the versatility of a flatbed with the speed of a sheet-fed scanner. With both a flatbed glass and a 50-sheet ADF, it handles everything from passports and IDs to high-volume document batches.
